query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by parcel area descending, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: Select parcels (teig) in Trondheim with area >5000 m2 and geometry

2.description: Select high-risk quick-clay hazard polygons (geometry and risk class)

3.description: Intersect parcels with quick-clay hazard polygons and attach municipality and county names

5.description: Get county name for fylkesnummer containing Trondheim
